buyCoins.noPackages: No packages available at this time
buyCoins.cannotProcessPayment: Payment cannot be processed at this time
buyCoins.purchaseSuccess: Acquisition successful! You obtained {{amount}} Virtual Coins
buyCoins.paymentSuccessDelayed: Payment successful. Your Virtual Coins will be credited shortly.
buyCoins.paymentDeclined: Payment was declined. Please try with another payment method.
buyCoins.paymentError: Payment could not be processed. Please try again.
buyCoins.coinsAvailable: Virtual Coins are now available in your account
buyCoins.pendingDesc: Your payment is being verified by the bank.
buyCoins.pendingNotice: Important: Virtual Coins will be credited automatically when the payment is confirmed. This may take from a few minutes to a few hours depending on the payment method.
buyCoins.declinedDesc: Your payment was not approved by the financial institution.
buyCoins.declinedNotice: No charges were made to your account. You can try again with a different payment method or contact your bank.
buyCoins.declinedAlert: Your Virtual Coins payment was declined.
buyCoins.delayedDesc: Your payment was successfully charged, but there was an issue crediting your Virtual Coins. They will be credited automatically in a few moments.
buyCoins.delayedNotice: Do not make another payment. Your money is safe and the Virtual Coins will appear in your account shortly. If you don't see them in a few minutes, contact us via WhatsApp.
buyCoins.paymentUnavailable: Payment system is not available at this time
